languages.text: За долгую и прославленную историю существования, в летописи легиона было внесено немало записей о громких победах, однако эти победы были омыты кровью бесчисленного количества бойцов. Стремясь заслужить прощение, меровцы добровольно отправляются на выполнение самых опасных тактических операций.

Throughout its long and glorious history, the annals of the legion have recorded many resounding victories, but these victories have been bathed in the blood of countless fighters. Striving for redemption, the Merovians volunteer for the most dangerous tactical missions.
languages.original_text: За долгую и прославленную историю существования, в летописи легиона было внесено немало записей о громких победах, однако эти победы были омыты кровью бесчисленного количества бойцов. Стремясь заслужить прощение, меровцы добровольно отправляются на выполнение самых опасных тактических операций.

traits.locale_text: Throughout its long and glorious history, the annals of the legion have recorded many resounding victories, but these victories have been bathed in the blood of countless fighters. Striving for redemption, the Merovians volunteer for the most dangerous tactical missions.

Throughout its long and glorious history, the annals of the legion have recorded many resounding victories, but these victories have been bathed in the blood of countless fighters. Striving for redemption, the Merovians volunteer for the most dangerous tactical missions.

Throughout its long and glorious history, the annals of the legion have recorded many resounding victories, but these victories have been bathed in the blood of countless fighters. Striving for redemption, the Merovians volunteer for the most dangerous tactical missions.

languages.text: A lo largo de su larga y gloriosa historia, los anales de la legión registran numerosas victorias aplastantes, pero esas victorias se han cobrado su precio en la sangre de un sinfín de guerreros. Los merovianos, buscando la redención, se presentan voluntarios para las misiones más peligrosas.
languages.original_text: Throughout its long and glorious history, the annals of the legion have recorded many resounding victories, but these victories have been bathed in the blood of countless fighters. Striving for redemption, the Merovians volunteer for the most dangerous tactical missions.

traits.locale_text: A lo largo de su larga y gloriosa historia, los anales de la legión registran numerosas victorias aplastantes, pero esas victorias se han cobrado su precio en la sangre de un sinfín de guerreros. Los merovianos, buscando la redención, se presentan voluntarios para las misiones más peligrosas.

languages.text: 在军团漫长而光辉的编年史中，记载了无数辉煌的胜利，由无数战士的鲜血所铸就。为求赎罪，梅罗夫人会主动请缨执行最危险的战术任务。
languages.original_text: Throughout its long and glorious history, the annals of the legion have recorded many resounding victories, but these victories have been bathed in the blood of countless fighters. Striving for redemption, the Merovians volunteer for the most dangerous tactical missions.

traits.locale_text: 在军团漫长而光辉的编年史中，记载了无数辉煌的胜利，由无数战士的鲜血所铸就。为求赎罪，梅罗夫人会主动请缨执行最危险的战术任务。

languages.text: Au cours de sa longue et glorieuse histoire, la légion a inscrit de nombreuses victoires éclatantes dans ses annales, bien qu'elles aient été arrachées au prix du sang d'innombrables combattants. En quête de rédemption, les Méroviens se portent volontaires pour les missions tactiques les plus dangereuses.
languages.original_text: Throughout its long and glorious history, the annals of the legion have recorded many resounding victories, but these victories have been bathed in the blood of countless fighters. Striving for redemption, the Merovians volunteer for the most dangerous tactical missions.

traits.locale_text: Au cours de sa longue et glorieuse histoire, la légion a inscrit de nombreuses victoires éclatantes dans ses annales, bien qu'elles aient été arrachées au prix du sang d'innombrables combattants. En quête de rédemption, les Méroviens se portent volontaires pour les missions tactiques les plus dangereuses.

languages.text: Uzun ve şanlı tarihi boyunca lejyonun yıllıkları, pek çok yankı uyandıran zafer kaydetmiştir ancak bu zaferler sayısız savaşçının kanıyla yıkanmıştır. Kefaretlerini ödeyip günahlarından arınmak için çabalayan Merovlular, en tehlikeli taktiksel görevlere gönüllü olurlar.
languages.original_text: Throughout its long and glorious history, the annals of the legion have recorded many resounding victories, but these victories have been bathed in the blood of countless fighters. Striving for redemption, the Merovians volunteer for the most dangerous tactical missions.

traits.locale_text: Uzun ve şanlı tarihi boyunca lejyonun yıllıkları, pek çok yankı uyandıran zafer kaydetmiştir ancak bu zaferler sayısız savaşçının kanıyla yıkanmıştır. Kefaretlerini ödeyip günahlarından arınmak için çabalayan Merovlular, en tehlikeli taktiksel görevlere gönüllü olurlar.

languages.text: 長い栄光の歴史の中で、レギオンは多くの勝利を収めた。しかし、その勝利は数え切れない戦士たちの血で染まっていた。贖罪を求めて、メロヴィング家は最も危険な戦術任務に志願する。
languages.original_text: Throughout its long and glorious history, the annals of the legion have recorded many resounding victories, but these victories have been bathed in the blood of countless fighters. Striving for redemption, the Merovians volunteer for the most dangerous tactical missions.

traits.locale_text: 長い栄光の歴史の中で、レギオンは多くの勝利を収めた。しかし、その勝利は数え切れない戦士たちの血で染まっていた。贖罪を求めて、メロヴィング家は最も危険な戦術任務に志願する。

languages.text: Im Laufe ihrer langen und ruhmreichen Geschichte haben die Annalen der Legion viele widerhallende Siege verzeichnet. Siege, die mit dem Blut zahlloser Kämpfer bezahlt wurden. Auf der Suche nach Vergeltung melden sich die Merovianer freiwillig für besonders gefährliche taktische Missionen.
languages.original_text: Throughout its long and glorious history, the annals of the legion have recorded many resounding victories, but these victories have been bathed in the blood of countless fighters. Striving for redemption, the Merovians volunteer for the most dangerous tactical missions.
